description: Director Agent workflow specification -- critique format per Sections 10.4-10.5 (timestamped observations, directional deltas not absolute values, edge reveal reporting, physics/motion feel descriptions). HITL circuit breaker process per Section 10.3 (human reviews, approves/modifies/rejects/overrides). Convergence criteria per Section 10.7 (no Priority 1 issues, human sign-off, visual_status marked tuned). Visual Critique template. Covers TC-15 (convergence in <=5 iterations) and TC-16 (Director-tuned presets outperform blind-authored).
notes: Tier 4 integration. High priority. All 8 tuning objectives (OBJ-059 through OBJ-066) plus OBJ-068 depend on this. Spec defines: (1) HITL workflow protocol with 4 dispositions, (2) Visual Critique template with P1/P2 classification, (3) renderTestClip() utility wrapping OBJ-035 Orchestrator, (4) TuningLog JSON schema with Zod validation, (5) TC-15/TC-16 measurement frameworks, (6) Director Agent system prompt template.
